resources.string: Unscroll uses this service to recognise when a short-form video feed (Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, TikTok) is on screen, so it can limit endless scrolling. It only inspects view identifiers of the supported apps. Nothing is read, stored or sent anywhere; messages and the rest of each app are never touched.
Scroll limit reached — refills in %1$d min
Unscroll needs the accessibility service to see when a Reels / Shorts / TikTok feed is open. Enable “%1$s” in the list.
Only Reels, Shorts and TikTok feeds are limited. DMs, search and everything else stay open.
